fields.description: Implement SAML 2.0-based single sign-on to support enterprise identity providers such as Okta and Azure AD. Includes SP-initiated and IdP-initiated flows. Contact: rafael.costa@domain.example.org.
Build a guided onboarding experience that walks new users through workspace creation, team invitations, and initial project setup. Reduce time-to-first-value below five minutes.
Replace the flat-rate billing model with a metered usage pipeline. Track API calls, storage, and compute minutes and generate monthly invoices via Stripe. Contact: billing-team@domain.example.org.
Create a read-only dashboard for C-level stakeholders showing KPIs such as MRR, churn rate, and feature adoption over configurable time ranges.

Develop a bidirectional sync between our platform and Salesforce. Contacts, opportunities, and activity logs should stay in sync with configurable field mappings. Contact: integrations@domain.example.org.
Identify and remediate the top-10 slowest API endpoints. Target p95 latency under 200 ms through query optimization, caching layers, and connection pooling.
Instrument all backend services with OpenTelemetry traces and export them to Grafana Tempo. Include automatic span creation for HTTP, gRPC, and database calls.
Redesign the permission model to support custom roles, resource-level scopes, and an admin UI for managing role assignments. Contact: security@domain.example.org.
Audit the entire web application against WCAG 2.2 AA criteria and remediate all critical and major violations. Includes keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and color contrast fixes.
Build a reliable webhook delivery service with exponential backoff retries, delivery logs, and a developer portal for managing subscriptions and viewing payload history.
Allow customers to export all of their data in CSV and JSON formats. Include scheduled exports to S3-compatible storage. Contact: dpo@domain.example.org.
Implement conflict-free replicated data types to enable multiple users to edit documents simultaneously with live cursor presence and change attribution.
Integrate with HashiCorp Vault for dynamic secret generation and automatic rotation of database credentials, API keys, and TLS certificates across all environments.
